arts.ttl: Atalanta vs Real Madrid: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid travel to Atalanta in the Champions League on Tuesday night. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups and more.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid’s possible line-up vs Atalanta in Champions League: Mbappé + Vini or Rodrygo?
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti is set to choose between Dani Ceballos and Arda Güler in a four-man midfield in Bergamo, where Real Madrid take on Atalanta in a crucial Champions League clash on Tuesday . Thibaut Courtois; Lucas Vázquez, Aurélien Tchouameni, Antonio Rüdiger, Fran García; Dani Ceballos/Arda Güler, Luka Modric, Fede Valverde, Jude Bellingham; Kylian Mbappé, Vinícius Júnior/Rodrygo Goes .

arts.ttl: Will Vinícius Júnior play for Real Madrid against Atalanta in the Champions League?
arts.sum: Speaking to reporters after the team’s arrival in Italy, Madrid boss Carlo Ancelotti said he would wait until after the players' final pre-game training session later on Monday before making a decision on the Brazilian’s involvement in the matchday-six clash at Gewiss Stadium. Vinícius has missed Madrid’s last four games with a hamstring injury sustained in the LaLiga win at Leganés on November 24, but has returned to Los Merengues' matchday squad for the trip to Bergamo.

arts.ttl: How many points do Real Madrid need in the Champions League to qualify for the round of 16?
arts.sum: After the first five games, Carlo Ancelotti’s team sits in 24th place with six points (two wins and three losses), the last spot that grants access to the knockout phase playoffs, which determine the final eight qualifiers for the Round of 16. At the start of the season, UEFA conducted multiple simulations to predict the number of points needed to advance in the Champions League .
